idea_text: AI dashboard for every creator business metric

report.idea_text: AI dashboard for every creator business metric
report.executive_summary: The report contains noisy adjacent signals and broad creator analytics interest, but no direct pain, no WTP, and no concrete buyer segment.

evidence.title: creator dashboard mentions
evidence.summary: Supporting signal: broad keyword mentions of dashboards for creators without a specific problem or buyer.

evidence.title: analytics tools comparison
evidence.summary: Adjacent proof: search comparisons mention analytics tools but do not show creator willingness to pay.

evidence.title: general creator metrics thread
evidence.summary: Supporting community signal: creators discuss metrics generally, but there is no repeated urgent pain.

direct_competitors.name: GenericAnalytics
direct_competitors.gap: No validated gap. Mentioned only as a broad alternative.

report.ideal_customer_profile: Evidence gap: buyer segment is too broad.
report.pricing_strategy: Evidence gap: no paid intent or pricing evidence was found.
report.positioning: Evidence gap: category positioning is not supported by direct proof.
